summary: Completed comprehensive backend and frontend testing for EvidencePilot AI MVP. 22/23 backend tests passed. All frontend flows working correctly. AI analysis endpoint works but times out via Kubernetes ingress (60s limit) - the actual LLM calls complete successfully in ~80-90s.

minor.issue: Kubernetes ingress times out (502) before AI analysis completes. Analysis takes ~80-90s but ingress has 60s timeout. Backend logs show both providers (gpt-5.2 + claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929) complete successfully.
minor.note: This is an infrastructure limitation, not a code bug. The AI providers work correctly.

issues: Sidebar shows 'Guidance Library' but route is /library not /guidance - minor UX inconsistency

action_items: Consider implementing async/background AI analysis with polling to avoid ingress timeout
Or increase Kubernetes ingress timeout for /api/cases/{id}/analyze endpoint
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed: Added null check in analyze_case endpoint (line 413) to prevent AttributeError when case is None
CaseWorkspace.jsx has ESLint warning about missing 'reload' dependency in useEffect - minor
seed_data_creation: Test cases created with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend API fully functional. AI analysis works but may timeout via public URL due to Kubernetes ingress 60s limit. Test AI analysis via direct backend calls or increase timeout. Frontend routes: / (Dashboard), /new (New Analysis), /cases (All Cases), /cases/:id (Case Workspace), /library (Guidance Library), /settings (Settings), /help (Help).

backend: GET /api/categories/{id}/logic-tree - auth_saml, web_tier, pro_crash, default fallback
POST /api/cases - creates case with correct structure
GET /api/cases - lists cases with score field
POST /api/cases/{id}/files - multipart upload with layer auto-detection
frontend: Dashboard loads with stats and recent cases
New Analysis 3-step wizard works (category → context → confirm → creates case)
Case Workspace tabs all functional (Evidence, Logic Tree, AI Comparison, Gaps, Export)
Logic tree renders questions and saves answers
AI comparison tab shows run button and empty state
Settings page loads and saves correctly
Guidance Library shows categories with tips and common mistakes

ai_integration_status.provider_a: OpenAI GPT-5.2 via Emergent Universal Key - WORKING
ai_integration_status.provider_b: Anthropic Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent Universal Key - WORKING
ai_integration_status.note: Both providers complete successfully in backend logs. Timeout is infrastructure-level.
